name: Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Salad Oil or Melted Crisco
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the flour, cornmeal, baking powder, and salt.
2. Beat the egg and add milk and oil (or shortening).
3. Add to the dry ingredients and stir just enough to moisten.
4. Pour into a greased 8-inch square pan.
5. Bake in a 400°F oven for 30 minutes.
